metadata.description: Indie toolkit with iOS development, macOS tooling, and more

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Cross-stack development workflow: brainstorm, planning, phase orchestration, execution, review, debugging, design analysis, commits, and session management

plugins.name: apple-dev
plugins.description: Complete iOS/macOS/iPadOS development workflow plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: mactools
plugins.description: macOS automation toolkit plugin with Notes, Calendar, Mail, Safari, Spotlight, and more

plugins.name: product-lens
plugins.description: Product evaluation for indie developers: demand validation, market/moat assessment, feature assessment, and product comparison

plugins.name: skill-master
plugins.description: Unified plugin lifecycle: brainstorm, create, eval, review, iterate, and package Claude Code plugins and components. Single entry /master with intent routing.

plugins.name: skill-audit
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED: use skill-master] Review Claude Code plugins from the AI executor perspective

plugins.name: wechat-bridge
plugins.description: Bridge WeChat messages to Claude Code sessions via MCP --channels protocol. Enables permission relay and bidirectional messaging.

plugins.name: x-api
plugins.description: X (Twitter) API v2 MCP server — exposes 120+ API operations as MCP tools with Bearer Token and OAuth2 PKCE support.

plugins.name: minimax-quota
plugins.description: MiniMax coding plan quota checker — only requires MINIMAX_API_KEY

plugins.name: netease-cloud-music
plugins.description: NetEase Cloud Music helper built around the maintained ncmctl CLI for cloud uploads and cookie-based login flows

plugins.name: shared-utils
plugins.description: Reusable utility scripts and skills shared across indie-toolkit plugins: Notion API helpers, MongoDB queries, and other cross-plugin primitives
